title: fees.rs zip317_fee doc: logical_actions=2 wrong for 1-in-1-out
description: fees.rs line 37: 'For a typical shielded payment (one Sapling spend, one Sapling output), logical_actions = 2' is wrong. sapling_logical_actions(1,1) = max(1,1) = 1, as the module-level doc at line 15 correctly states. The minimum fee of 10_000 comes from GRACE_ACTIONS=2 applied in zip317_fee, not from logical_actions itself. A contributor reading this will misunderstand the fee model. Fix: correct the docstring to state logical_actions=1 and explain that GRACE_ACTIONS sets the effective minimum.
